notes: This manifest is the current-season counterpart to the broad 2024-2026 residual-ridge replay.
The residual model trains only on prior prediction errors during replay; the current match is never used to train its own correction.
Keep this replay in the mixed-scope deployment review because 2026 current-season behavior matters more than broad-history averages alone.
